FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: A collection of questions and answers you might have about using WorksDD so you can start searching for jobs with confidence.

employer.q: Is there a fee to post a job vacancy?
employer.a: WorksDD offers flexible job posting options, including both free posts and premium packages that enhance your company's visibility.

employer.q: When can I delete or edit a job post?
employer.a: You can manage your job postings at any time through the Employer Dashboard. Changes will be reflected on the website in real-time.

employer.q: Does the system have features to help screen candidates?
employer.a: We feature an AI Matching system and application management tools that help you accurately find and sort candidates matching your required skills.

employer.q: How can I view a candidate's resume?
employer.a: When a candidate applies for a job, you can view their details and download their resume directly through the application management system in your employer account.

employer.q: What types of jobs does this website support?
employer.a: WorksDD supports all forms of job postings, ranging from full-time, part-time, and freelance work to student internship recruitment.

employer.q: If I encounter technical issues while using the platform, how do I get in touch?
employer.a: You can immediately submit a request through the Support system on your Dashboard or reach out to our team via the channels specified on our Contact Us page.

candidate.q: Is there any cost for registering and using the platform?
candidate.a: Creating a profile and applying for jobs through WorksDD is completely free for all job seekers.

candidate.q: What should I do if I forget my password or cannot log in?
candidate.a: You can click the 'Forgot Password' button on the login page to request a password reset link sent to your registered email.

candidate.q: Can I adjust the privacy settings of my resume?
candidate.a: Yes, you can set your profile status to Private so your personal information won't appear in company search results until you choose to apply for that specific job.

candidate.q: How does the website help recommend suitable jobs for me?
candidate.a: We utilize an AI-powered Recommendation system that analyzes the skills and experience on your resume to suggest the jobs that match you best.

candidate.q: Can I apply to multiple companies at the same time?
candidate.a: There are no limitations. You can submit applications to an unlimited number of positions that interest you, and the system will help track the status of each application on a single page.

candidate.q: Can I edit my resume after I have already applied for a job?
candidate.a: If you wish to update your information, you can upload a new resume on your profile page, which will be saved for your next job applications.

JobseekerGuide.heroDesc: Understand key button locations, search functions, and job categories to quickly find the right job for you.
JobseekerGuide.featureResumeDesc: Fill out your digital resume to apply for any job instantly in one click.
JobseekerGuide.featureAlertDesc: Get instant notifications when companies view your resume or schedule interviews.
JobseekerGuide.featureFilterDesc: Refine your quick job search by location, salary range, or detailed job types.
JobseekerGuide.uiSectionHint: 💡 Click on the simulated boxes or press numbers to see details for each section.
JobseekerGuide.step1Desc: The topmost main menu for browsing jobs by region (e.g., Central, Northern) or accessing quick search.
JobseekerGuide.step1Tips: You can filter jobs by region to discover career growth opportunities right in your hometown.
JobseekerGuide.step2Desc: A large central search bar allowing you to specify job titles, skills, or company names along with your preferred province.
JobseekerGuide.step2Tips: Combine keywords with a province selection for the most precise results and to save commute time.
JobseekerGuide.step3Desc: Large category tabs such as 'Front Store Jobs' or 'Office Jobs' to clearly separate distinct career tracks.
JobseekerGuide.step3Tips: Clicking through categories filters out irrelevant job tracks in a single click.
JobseekerGuide.step4Desc: Cards displaying detailed sub-categories along with real-time figures of currently open positions.
JobseekerGuide.step4Tips: A higher number of openings indicates greater chances of getting hired and called for an interview.
JobseekerGuide.timelineDesc: Keep track of your application progress in real-time.
JobseekerGuide.timelineStep1Desc: Your details have been delivered directly to the employer's dashboard, completing your process.
JobseekerGuide.timelineStep2Desc: HR has opened and completed an initial review of your resume and qualifications.
JobseekerGuide.timelineStep3Desc: If qualifications match, the system will notify you of the interview date and time.
JobseekerGuide.faqDesc: Answers to the most common questions from jobseekers regarding system usage.
JobseekerGuide.faq1Q: Is registration required before searching for jobs?
JobseekerGuide.faq1A: No, it is not required. Jobseekers can visit the website, search for openings, and view descriptions immediately. However, registration is recommended before applying so the system can seamlessly forward your profile.
JobseekerGuide.faq2Q: What is Express Apply and how does it differ from regular application?
JobseekerGuide.faq2A: Express Apply is a shortcut enabling jobseekers to send resumes instantly in a few clicks without long forms. Ideal for urgent roles.

EmployerGuide.title: System Interface & Usage Guide
EmployerGuide.description: Understand the process of setting up your company profile, posting job vacancies, and managing applicants to start recruiting with confidence.

overview.setupDesc: Fill in information once, use it for all job postings.
overview.postDesc: Save as draft or publish instantly anytime.
overview.manageDesc: Resumes and contact details are ready for your review.

EmployerGuide.interactiveHint: 💡 Click on the simulated boxes or numbers to view details for each step.

step1.title: 1. Company Setup
step1.desc: Fill in company details, upload a logo, and verify your corporate identity to make your job posts publishable and trustworthy to candidates.
step1.tips: Complete company verification first. If not yet approved, your job posts can only be saved as drafts and cannot be published immediately.

step2.title: 2. Post a Job
step2.desc: Fill in job descriptions, salary ranges, qualifications, and benefits, then choose to save as a draft or publish immediately.
step2.tips: Include required skills as keywords. The AI system will use this data to automatically pre-screen applicants who match your criteria.

step3.title: 3. Manage Applicants
step3.desc: View lists of candidates who applied, along with their resumes and contact info. You can filter and sort them as appropriate.
step3.tips: Open and view candidate resumes and contact details instantly once they apply—no need to wait for them to send additional files.

step4.title: 4. Update Status & Close Job (Hiring)
step4.desc: Change application statuses (e.g., Interview, Passed, or Rejected) and close the job posting once you have hired the right person.
step4.tips: Once closed, the job post will no longer appear in candidate searches, but past applicant data can still be reviewed anytime.

guidelines.title: System Guidelines & Tips
guidelines.tip1: Double-check your company information and job details before publishing, and keep them up to date.
guidelines.tip2: Regularly monitor applicant statuses using the Employer Dashboard.
guidelines.tip3: Respond to applicants quickly to improve your hiring conversion rate.
guidelines.tip4: Close job postings once positions are filled to reduce redundant data.
